description:
Keep up-to-date with the latest news, subscribe here: http://bit.ly/AFP-subscribe

Indian paramilitary officers attend yoga classes as part of a governmental programme ahead of International Yoga Day.

Follow AFP English on Facebook:
https://www.facebook.com/AFPnewsenglish

Latest news on AFP English Twitter:
https://twitter.com/AFP

Share your top stories on Google+
http://bit.ly/AFP-Gplus

chapters.title: India gears up for Sunday's International Yoga Day
Pankaj Kumar Singh Indian Border Security Force officer
Acid attack victims takes part in annual event
Halil Ahmed Indian Central Reserve Police Force officer
